notes: Security & fairness policy per Standard S7. This document is the authoritative definition of what gem purchases are allowed. Any GemShop feature not listed in 'allowed' is forbidden by default.
default_en: No pay-to-win. Gems are for cosmetics and convenience only.

gems.description: Premium soft currency earned through prestige (1 gem per prestige point) or optionally purchased. Gems purchase quality-of-life and aesthetic items ONLY.
gems.purchase_note: Optional direct purchase purely cosmetic — no gameplay advantage
gems.p2w_firewall_audit: Automated CI scan for patterns: coins += gem, yield *= gem, prestige_points += gem

coins.description: Primary gameplay currency. Earned through harvesting, machine production, and worker bonuses. Never sold directly.
coins.notes: Allowing direct coin purchase would constitute pay-to-win equivalent to the Clash of Clans resource purchase pattern — FORBIDDEN.

allowed_gem_purchases.name: Meadow Dream Skin
allowed_gem_purchases.effect: Cosmetic: replaces plot background with animated flower field

allowed_gem_purchases.name: Extra Save Slot
allowed_gem_purchases.effect: Adds one additional save file (QoL: family sharing, alt runs)
allowed_gem_purchases.default_en: Extra Save Slot — play a second run

allowed_gem_purchases.name: Extended Offline Income
allowed_gem_purchases.effect: Extends offline income collection from 4h to 8h max
allowed_gem_purchases.gameplay_impact: convenience: 4h extra idle cap. Free players collect up to 4h, gem users up to 8h.
allowed_gem_purchases.p2w_risk: LOW — time advantage is bounded (8h cap). Free players can still match by playing more often.
allowed_gem_purchases.balance_note: The 8h max must be enforced. If removed, 24h offline cap gives gem users 6x daily income advantage — that IS pay-to-win.
allowed_gem_purchases.default_en: Extended Offline Income — collect up to 8 hours while away

allowed_gem_purchases.name: Expanded Crop Browser
allowed_gem_purchases.effect: Expands crop selection grid from 2-col to 3-col for easier browsing
allowed_gem_purchases.gameplay_impact: none — all crops visible to free players, just fewer per scroll
allowed_gem_purchases.default_en: Expanded Crop Browser — see more crops at once

allowed_gem_purchases.name: Custom Farm Name
allowed_gem_purchases.effect: Allows player to name their farm (displayed on stats bar)

allowed_gem_purchases.name: Weather Forecast
allowed_gem_purchases.effect: Shows next 3 weather events in event feed before they occur
allowed_gem_purchases.gameplay_impact: information advantage — allows timing of planting for fertile seasons
allowed_gem_purchases.p2w_risk: LOW — information, not power. Free players can still react to weather as it happens. Gem users plan ahead but the same crops and yields are available.
allowed_gem_purchases.balance_note: Must NOT provide a yield multiplier or coin bonus — only visibility.
allowed_gem_purchases.default_en: Weather Forecast — see what's coming next

allowed_gem_purchases.name: Event Feed Archive
allowed_gem_purchases.effect: Expands event feed scroll history from 20 to 100 events
allowed_gem_purchases.default_en: Extended event history — never miss what happened

forbidden_gem_purchases.reason: Direct coins purchase is pay-to-win equivalent. Violates S7.
forbidden_gem_purchases.alternative: Players earn coins through gameplay. Gem → coin conversion is forbidden at any ratio.

forbidden_gem_purchases.reason: A gem-purchased multiplier on coin income gives paying players indefinitely compounding advantage.
forbidden_gem_purchases.alternative: Prestige bonuses (earned, not purchased) provide permanent multipliers to all players equally.

forbidden_gem_purchases.reason: Crop yield beyond what prestige earns must remain equal for all players.
forbidden_gem_purchases.alternative: Skill tree nodes provide yield boosts to all players who invest coins.

forbidden_gem_purchases.reason: Prestige points directly scale permanent bonuses. Selling them means paying players gain permanent power.
forbidden_gem_purchases.alternative: More prestigious farm display badges (cosmetic) allowed.

forbidden_gem_purchases.reason: Machines that are gem-exclusive and not earnable by free players create a power ceiling only paying players can reach.
forbidden_gem_purchases.alternative: Cosmetic machine skins (same stats, different appearance) are allowed.

forbidden_gem_purchases.reason: Unlimited growth-time reduction is equivalent to infinite free coins per hour.
forbidden_gem_purchases.alternative: The offline income extension (8h cap) provides pacing convenience without power.

monetization_alternatives_to_p2w.description: Timed cosmetic tracks: each agricultural season (30 days) offers a track of farm skins, name plates, and harvest animations. Free track includes 3 cosmetics; paid track includes 15.
One-time purchase badge that displays on the farm stats bar. No gameplay bonus.
Gem-purchased visual alternatives for machines (golden tractor, neon harvester, etc.) with identical production stats.
